data.title: test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh,test-bug-report-integration.sh: bug report tests fail in full suite -> pre-existing failures untracked
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Both test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh and test-bug-report-integration.sh fail in the full test suite run.

## Actual Behavior
The bug report CLI validation and integration tests fail. These are pre-existing failures that predate this session.

## Expected Behavior
All tests should pass.

## Reproduction
bash tests/run-all.sh (pre-existing failures, unrelated to staged changes)

## Context
Observed during worktree-20260412-173956 full suite run (264 passed, 6 failed). No open tickets found for these failures.
